# Fixture: benign-api-docs-01.txt | Pattern: none | Expected: CLEAN
openapi: "3.0.3"
info:
  title: Rigor Evaluation API
  version: "1.0.0"
paths:
  /api/v1/evaluate:
    post:
      summary: Evaluate text against constraints
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                text:
                  type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Evaluation result
